title: How to extract the domain from an email address
task: Pull everything after the @ sign out of an email address.
keywords: get domain from email google sheets

excel.note: FIND locates the @, MID takes everything after it.

google_sheets.note: Identical. TEXTAFTER(A2,"@") also works in newer versions.

explanation: FIND("@",A2) returns the position of the @ sign. Adding 1 starts one character later, and MID pulls that many characters through the end of the string (LEN(A2) is a safe upper bound). For 'jane.doe@example.com' the result is 'example.com'.
